name: Dobutsu Shogi
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Dobutsu Shogi (Animal Shogi, Madoka Kitao 2008): a 3x4 introductory Shogi for children, played with four cute animals each. Lion (king), Giraffe, Elephant and a Chick that promotes to a Hen. Captured animals switch sides and drop back in. Win by catching the enemy Lion or by walking your own Lion safely onto the enemy home row (a 'Try'). A fully solved game.
